name: V5 Reader Impact Suite
description: Deterministic benchmark fixtures for the scaffolded v5 reader-impact layer, targeting felt reader response rather than structural validity alone.

fixtures.title: Delayed Grief Letter
fixtures.text_under_test: A daughter postpones reading her mother's last letter through three scenes of practical labor, then finally opens it in the workshop where the mother's voice returns through specific remembered instruction.

reader_state_expectation.emotional_state: grief deepens through action before release
reader_state_expectation.curiosity_state: letter contents remain active and consequential

fixtures.notes: Tests whether emotional movement is earned through scene consequence rather than sentimental declaration.

fixtures.title: Transformed Object Payoff
fixtures.text_under_test: A strongly planted object is never used in its expected literal way but returns as the key to a more complete, transformed payoff.

reader_state_expectation.expectation_state: literal payoff expectation is replaced by higher-order fulfillment

fixtures.notes: Targets satisfaction under transformed obligation fulfillment rather than direct payoff mimicry.

fixtures.title: Retrospectively Fair Twist
fixtures.text_under_test: A late reveal reorders prior scenes but remains fully traceable through earlier phrasing, object placement, and motive shading.

reader_state_expectation.expectation_state: reader should feel surprised but not cheated

fixtures.notes: Tests balance between predictability and arbitrariness.

fixtures.title: Pressure Held Without Numbness
fixtures.text_under_test: A pursuit sequence escalates across four scenes with intermittent breaths that deepen dread instead of dissipating it.
fixtures.notes: Tests whether tension accumulation remains absorbable rather than exhausting.

fixtures.title: Single Image Retention
fixtures.text_under_test: A story returns to one concrete image in transformed contexts so that the image lingers after plot details fade.
fixtures.notes: Tests motif stickiness without semantic redundancy collapse.

fixtures.title: Dense But Trackable Revelation
fixtures.text_under_test: A scene introduces multiple institutions, names, and obligations, but referents remain recoverable and the reader's understanding stabilizes by the end.
fixtures.notes: Tests upper-bound complexity that should remain readable rather than collapsing into confusion.
